data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the scenario behavior of 'Auto-offer when cancellation occurs', but the evidence does not confirm that this functionality is implemented or tested. The linked use case outlines the need for automatic notifications and an acceptance workflow, yet there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates these features are functioning as required. This leads to a clear gap in the validation of the scenario's expected outcome.
gaps: No evidence of automatic notifications being sent to qualified substitutes upon cancellation.
No evidence of the acceptance workflow functionality being tested or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
